review_text_liked: This was my second time staying at Container Smart Stay CSS, and once again, it was a fantastic experience. The host, Kadek, was incredibly welcoming and made sure we felt right at home. We also had the pleasure of meeting the owners, who are truly kind and wonderful people. The rooms were clean and comfortable, providing a perfect place to relax after a day of exploring. If you love nature, there’s plenty to do in the area. From visiting the Botanical Garden and the nearby lake to riding a scooter through the scenic hills, there’s no shortage of beautiful sights to enjoy. Highly recommend staying here, and I’ll definitely be back!

review_title: Unique and sustainable accommodation experience, with a fantastic host
review_text_liked: The Container Smart Stay in Bali is a truly unique and innovative accommodation option. The use of shipping containers as living spaces is an original idea that promotes sustainability. The host, Kadek, is exceptionally friendly and helpful, ensuring a memorable experience for guests. The location is perfect, with nearby lakes and the beautiful botanical garden. This stay offers a refreshing change from traditional hotels, with its original concept, fantastic host, and great location.

The location is perfect, with nearby lakes and the beautiful botanical garden. This stay offers a refreshing change from traditional hotels, with its original concept, fantastic host, and great location.

owner_resp_text: Thank you for sharing your positive experience at Container Smart Stay Bali! We're thrilled to hear that our unique concept resonated with you, and we appreciate your acknowledgment of our commitment to sustainability. It's wonderful to know that Kadek's hospitality made your stay memorable. We're glad you enjoyed our prime location near lakes and the botanical garden. Your kind words inspire us to continue providing refreshing and innovative stays. We look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable experience.

owner_resp_text: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us! We appreciate your feedback on the evening karaoke and will take it into consideration for future improvements. It's great to know that you liked the complimentary coffee, water, and tomatoes in the lobby. We're pleased you took advantage of the option to order food from the local restaurant and found it to be a good value. We look forward to welcoming you back for another enjoyable stay.

owner_resp_text: Dear Mr/Mrs Patricia Thank you for the review and for breakfast apologies we only serve Indonesian, and that is why we do not serve other since and if you really could not eat Indonesian, you could contact us and discuss with us as we are open for certain request. As for the location, surrounding us there are many shop local and restaurants. But since we are in the suburb area, they are close quite early. In fact you could as assistant to our staff who is there 24 hours. For your info ; and you are being upgraded for free from standard to superior room. Thank you. CsS management

review_text_liked: Отличный комплекс, чтобы провести выходные в горах. Номера свежие - отелю год, внутри все чисто, убрано. Постельное белье тоже чистое, белоснежное, что не всегда бывает в номерах данного ценового диапазона. Месторасположение хорошее - тихо, рядом озеро, можно погулять вдоль него. В номер можно заказывать еду, у них есть меню - заказываешь сотрудникам, они звонят, заказывают и приносят. На лобби можно брать кофе, чай, горячий шоколад и лапшу - очень согревает вечерами. Сотрудники очень любезные, дружелюбные, поддерживают беседу.
review_text_disliked: Контейнеры имеют металлические козырьки, которые при ветре очень шумят. Если у вас есть беруши - возьмите, они могут понадобиться. Днём жарко в номере, но достаточно открыть окна и двери, но мы особо днём не сидели в номере - рядом есть места, где можно провести весь день. Вечером холодно - одеяла вас конечно согреют, но лучше берите с собой теплые вещи. Ну и номер тесноват, однако для задачи - переночевать день, два - самый раз.

review_text_liked: Die Idee ist super mit den Containern. Auch der nachhaltige Gedanke. Das Frühstück ist eigentlich erst ab 08:00 Uhr. Wir konnten es jedoch um 07:00 bestellen da wir um 08:00 im Bali Bike Park gebucht hatten. Es gibt rund um die Uhr gratis Kaffee und Tee in der Lobby.
review_text_disliked: Leider war das Wasser beim Duschen eher nur knapp warm. Da es an diesem Tag viel geregt hat und bewölkt war, wäre eine heisse dusche schön gewesen. Bei schönem Wetter oder in der trocken Saison bestimmt weniger ein Problem.

owner_resp_text: Dear Miss Kandel. Thank you very much for the review. We will fire the staff as he already 11 months have the chance to learn english. We hope you are satisfied. As for the humidity, you are coming on the wet season/rainy thus the humidity is high every where in Bali. Than for the cold, you are coming at the high land in Bali. Of course it is cold, in fact, you could always ask for additional duvet. last but not list, the wifi, our wifi work properly during your stay, however if the speed is not as fast as you expected, please understand that it is in the rural area. Regards CsS Management

review_text_liked: Das Personal war sehr lieb und hat bei Fragen oder Anmerkungen direkt geholfen.
review_text_disliked: Die Dusche war sehr ekelhaft. Generell war es aufgrund der mangelnden Isolierung sehr kalt, wodurch wir uns erkältet hatten. Wir hatten über die Unterkunft einen Roller gemietet. Im Vergleich zu anderen Orten war es sehr teuer. Die wollten 150k pro Tag. Des Weiteren mussten wir feststellen, dass eine der Bremsen des Rollers während der Fahrt versagt hat. Zum Glück ist nichts passiert, aber es hätte schlimm für uns enden können.
